item.title: HTB — reversing a custom VM in 3 hours
item.description: The challenge binary implemented a 16-instruction stack VM in ~800 lines of C. The flag was encrypted and stored as VM bytecode. My job: reverse the ISA, write an emulator in Python, then work backwards from the encrypted output to the key.

item.title: hexplore
item.description: hexplore is the hex-viewer component extracted from a larger binary analysis tool. Drop a file on the embed above to inspect it in the browser — offset navigation, ASCII panel, and basic struct annotation.
